response.justification: Bogdan has solid engineering breadth and over 15 years of experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems, reaching Staff-level at Naver. However, the role demands deep, specialized expertise in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, telemetry pipelines, and statistical rollout-risk management — none of which appear in the resume. His work at Dunnhumby demonstrates exposure to high-throughput systems, and his pricing optimization work at Tencent touches on data-driven decisions, but neither constitutes the experimentation engineering ownership required at the Principal/IC6 level for a Growth Experimentation Systems role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across multiple languages (C/C++, Java, TypeScript, DLang) and domains, satisfying the language breadth requirement
Demonstrated exposure to high-scale distributed systems at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second) with low-latency, async I/O design
Current Staff-level role at Naver includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing trajectory toward platform/foundational work
concerns: No evidence of experimentation platform experience — A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout automation are entirely absent from the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure ownership; the role requires building foundational instrumentation and measurement systems across multiple teams
Resume lacks demonstrated cross-team technical leadership, stakeholder alignment, or multi-workstream initiative ownership at the scale expected of an IC6 Principal

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth measurement background
